failures.query: BBB CoreCap tubeless valve site:wiggle.com OR site:chainreactioncycles.com
BBB CoreCap tubeless valve price EUR buy
Schwalbe Clik valve price EUR buy
LME aluminum price USD per ton today

10.evidenceText: No retail price information found in either source. Source 1 describes product features and awards. Source 2 shows product title and specifications but no price data in the provided content.
10.extractionRationale: No retail prices were mentioned in either of the two provided sources. The content excerpts from bike-discount.de and bike24.com focus on product features, specifications, and awards, but do not contain any pricing information.

27.evidenceText: Four distinct product URLs identified: (1) https://www.bike24.de/p1960182.html - Schlauch No. 19 with Clik Valve, (2) https://www.bike24.de/p1859950.html - Tubeless-Ventil 80mm, (3) https://www.bike24.de/p1962295.html - Schlauch Nr. 3 with Clik Valve, (4) https://www.bike24.de/p1859949.html - Tubeless-Ventil 60mm
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs (p-numbers) from the provided sources. Source 1 is a category filter page, not a product listing. Sources 2-5 each represent distinct product listings with unique URLs and different product specifications (different tube sizes and tubeless valve configurations).

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - red | 2 Pieces | BIKE24
30.evidenceText: Product listing content includes description and features but no stock status indicators (out of stock, unavailable, nicht verfügbar, ausverkauft) are mentioned in the provided text excerpt.
30.extractionRationale: The provided product page content does not contain any explicit stock status information. Without evidence of stock status mentions, the percentage cannot be calculated and returns null per instructions.

56.evidenceText: Distinct Schwalbe inner tube models with Clik Valve found: (1) No. 17 | 28-47/622-635 | SCV, (2) Nr. 15 | 23/30-622/630 | SCV, (3) No. 17-EL | 28/44-622 | SCV, (4) No. 19 | 40-62/622-635 | SCV, (5) Nr. 3 | 47/62-305 | SCV 40mm, (6) Nr. 13 | 40/62-559 | SCV 40mm. Conversion kits and valve accessories excluded.
56.extractionRationale: Counted only distinct inner tube SKUs/models with Clik Valve interface across all sources. Excluded conversion kits (Umrüstkit) and valve sets which are accessories, not tubes. Each unique tube size/model was counted once.

61.evidenceText: Current and historical Aluminium prices, stocks and monthly averages.
61.extractionRationale: The sources provided do not contain an explicitly stated current LME aluminum spot price in USD per metric ton. Source 2 shows futures prices (3,593.55), Source 3 shows a forecasted price (3,553.92), and Source 4 shows alloy prices (3,165.00). The official LME source (Source 1) link is provided but the actual current spot price is not included in the content snippets.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest Historical Prices
62.extractionRationale: Most recent data point from Oct 29, 2025 shows premium of 1,793.99 cents/lb. Converted to USD/lb by dividing by 100: 1,793.99 ÷ 100 = $17.94/lb
